readerModel: claude-sonnet-5 (Claude Code Agent tool, model alias 'sonnet')
inferenceConfig: Claude Code Agent tool defaults (no overrides)
adjudicator: sonnet reread subagents + fable integrator (final decisions)
pairingRule: runOrdinal ascending non-overlapping pairs, registered before any extraction run started
independenceRule: each run is a fresh subagent session per chunk; no run reads another run's packets, adjudications, or outputs; the reference slice is never shown to readers
